prompt: Luxury fashion editorial product shot of a {argument name="bag color" default="taupe gray"} structured leather handbag with a top handle, wide folded flap, centered vertical seam, small gold bar clasp, and angular side gussets, carried by a glamorous woman posed in a rocky desert landscape. Medium close-up portrait composition, the bag prominently centered in the foreground and held near chest level by one hand gripping the handle, the model turned slightly sideways with bare shoulder and arm visible, wearing a dark brown pleated or textured dress. Long windblown wavy hair in {argument name="hair color" default="light brown with sun-kissed highlights"}, warm tanned skin, high-end campaign styling, confident elegant posture. Natural outdoor sunlight, warm earthy palette, beige and sandstone rock formations softly blurred in the background, shallow depth of field, realistic luxury advertising photography, rich texture on the leather, subtle highlights on the metal hardware, premium fashion magazine look. Add a small white rectangular picture-in-picture inset in the bottom-left corner showing the same handbag alone from the front on a clean white background, with the text {argument name="caption text" default="GPT Image2"} below it in simple black sans-serif lettering.
translatedPrompt: 奢华时尚编辑风格产品拍摄，主角为一款 {argument name="bag color" default="灰褐色"} 结构化皮革手袋，配有顶部手柄、宽折叠翻盖、居中垂直接缝、小型金条扣以及棱角分明的侧面角撑，由一位迷人的女性在岩石沙漠景观中展示。中景特写构图，手袋置于前景中心位置，由一只手握住手柄置于胸前，模特身体微侧，露出裸露的肩膀和手臂，身穿深棕色褶皱或纹理连衣裙。长长的风吹波浪卷发，发色为 {argument name="hair color" default="浅棕色配阳光亲吻般的高光"}，温暖的古铜色肌肤，高端广告大片造型，自信优雅的姿态。自然户外阳光，温暖的大地色调，背景为柔焦的米色和砂岩地层，浅景深，逼真的奢侈品广告摄影，皮革纹理丰富，金属五金件细节光泽细腻，呈现高级时尚杂志质感。在左下角添加一个白色矩形画中画插图，展示同一款手袋在纯白背景下的正面单品图，下方配有 {argument name="caption text" default="GPT Image2"} 字样，使用简洁的黑色无衬线字体。

breakdown.creativeCore: 奢华沙漠手袋广告大片：此提示词可生成一张逼真的高端时尚广告图片，展示沙漠编辑风格下的结构化手袋，适用于奢侈品营销和品牌样机展示。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 产品首图、广告图、电商详情页首屏

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 产品/电商 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, close-up, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, editorial, luxury, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
